# Banyan Consulting

> The AI-native Odoo consulting firm. Banyan pairs senior US-based architects with proprietary AI to make ERP implementation the easy part of digital transformation. Headquartered in Miami, Florida; serving mid-market companies across the United States.

Banyan focuses exclusively on Odoo (versions 18 and 19) and works across manufacturing, construction, professional services, retail and e-commerce, healthcare, real estate, and non-profit verticals.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://gobanyan.consulting/): overview of the firm and methodology
- [About](https://gobanyan.consulting/about.html): team, AI-native stack, manifesto
- [Services](https://gobanyan.consulting/services.html): first implementation, project recovery, strategic consulting, support and training
- [Industries](https://gobanyan.consulting/industries.html): sectors served
- [Pricing](https://gobanyan.consulting/pricing.html): engagement models
- [Contact](https://gobanyan.consulting/contact.html): free 45-minute architect diagnostic
- [FAQ](https://gobanyan.consulting/faq.html): common questions about Odoo and Banyan

## Key facts
- Specialization: Odoo ERP (v18 / v19), end-to-end implementation
- Location: Miami, Florida (Brickell City Centre, 78 SW 7th St, Miami, FL 33130)
- Delivery: US-based senior architects only, no offshore handoffs
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Average implementation: 48 hours from kickoff to live sandbox; 4 months end-to-end
- First-pass migration accuracy: 92%
- Proprietary AI toolkit accelerates configuration by ~40% versus traditional VARs
- Free 45-minute diagnostic with a senior architect (no salesperson)

## Differentiators
- AI-native: proprietary tooling for discovery, requirements, gap analysis, gap resolution, and configuration in one continuous process
- Senior architects only: no junior handoffs, no offshore delivery
- Native-first builds: custom code only when standard modules genuinely cannot fit
- Quarterly health checks driven by AI configuration audits

- Email: hello@gobanyan.consulting
- Phone: +1 (305) 555-0140
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 8am to 7pm Eastern
